printed_rule_summary: Near-term online-year window for additions entering the 2026--2028 generator-pipeline screen.
Active or operational queue records are included in the gross active-queue denominator used for the screen.
Withdrawn, canceled or otherwise non-active records are excluded from the screened effective-addition calculation.
Interconnection-agreement-stage records are retained as a subtotal used to distinguish later-stage projects from the gross active queue.
Base-case effective additions count non-storage generation additions and decompose them into thermal, wind and solar components.
Standalone storage is excluded from base-case effective additions.
Storage is shown separately as a 20% capacity-credit screening sensitivity and is not included in base-case margins.

Thermal effective capacity is retained as a resource-specific source-table field; factors are computed from effective capacity and nameplate by grid region and year rather than as one universal constant.

Wind effective capacity is retained as a resource-specific source-table field; factors are computed from effective capacity and nameplate by grid region and year rather than as one universal constant.

Solar effective capacity is retained as a resource-specific source-table field; factors are computed from effective capacity and nameplate by grid region and year rather than as one universal constant.
